Function - Using NPC (Soul Craft) 1. Increase Soul Force to upgrade 2. Exchange with Seal Removal Scroll.
- Acquisition Method - Can be obtained by extracting from any item that has 1 or higher Soul Force.
A scroll needed to remove a seal on an item. Right click to use.
Removes seal from item. Can obtain higher grade item with low probability.
Removes seal from item. Can obtain higher grade item with high probability.
Removes seal from item. Can obtain higher grade item with very high probability.

Increases your success rate when enchanting items - applies to items enchanted from +15 to +19 - each application consumes a stone

Increases your success rate when soul crafting Superior grade items.
Increases your success rate when soul crafting - applies to Special grade items - each application consumes a stone
Increases your success rate when soul crafting - applies to Artifact grade items - each application consumes a stone
Removes an item's soul crafting option - Downgrade your item to a previous grade and soulcraft it again - each application consumes a stone

Designed for skilled Paladins. If the wearer is not skilled enough, the armour rejects its owner.

Armour which can only be used by warriors destined to become a gladiator. The destiny alludes a new adventure.
Only veteran Gladiators can wear this. Highly efficient in close combat.
When equipped, a cool breeze protects the wearer. Best suited for Magicians.
armour forged with ores which can only be found in the deepest part of mine. It reinforces wearer's magic power.
Only the best Warmages can use the hidden power of Talontos armour.
the Archmages favorite armour set. There is a mysterious power imbued in Magement armour.
You must have an honest and reasonable mind to be able to utilize Erneston armour.
Ergonomic design improves the wearer's concentration.
Maxious armour draws the wearer's potential strength to the limit.
Armour designed after Chief Rocker. The elegant beauty makes it unique.
Shine Fever armour evokes passion from Dancers. Light material used to make the armour allows active movements.
Armour worn by the legendary Dancer, Turancra.
Designed for Ninjas, Gourian armour provides efficient camouflage.
Armour forged with the energy of a magnetic field. Protects the wearer by mingling with surrounding magnetic field.
Necessary ingredients for better quality. It doesn't have any effect when it's used for single items.
Necessary ingredients for better quality. It doesn't have any effect when it's used for single items.
Necessary ingredients for better quality. It doesn't have any effect when it's used for single items.

Recipe for Secmathian armor [Bearhand Fighter] . Wonderful chance to get ultimate armor. (Right click to use)

Increases Strength, Intelligence, Agility, and Health by +15 for 300 seconds.

Increases movement speed by 40% for 600 seconds.

Increases Max HP by +1500 and Strength by +15 for 300 seconds

Heals HP by +600 and removes poison effect.

Hidden scroll that warps the player to the Wrath of Nautilus once. Right click to check remaining use time before warping. (Hidden area is reset every hour, Recommended level: 20-24)
Hidden scroll that warps the player to the Dangerous Mecca once. Right click to check remaining use time before warping. (Hidden area is reset every hour, Recommended level: 35-39)
Hidden scroll that warps the player to Barlok's Lair once. Right click to check remaining use time before warping. (Hidden area is reset every hour, Recommended level: 40-44)
Hidden scroll that warps the player to Muddy Swamp once. Right click to check remaining use time before warping. (Hidden area is reset every hour, Recommended level: 49-50)
Hidden scroll that warps the player to the Forest opf Illusion once. Right click to check remaining use time before warping. (Hidden area is reset every hour, Recommended level: 53-56)

Sign that's given to Heroes for protecting Kazeura village from danger.
Looks sweet, but tastes really bitter.
This Cookie Factory Coin can be exchanged for something special at the gacha vending machine.
This Cookie Factory Coin can be exchanged for something special at the gacha vending machine.
A ticket allowing you to enter the Chocolatier's House in the Cookie Factory (F6).
A ticket allowing you enter the Chocolate Storage House in the Cookie Factory (F7).
Piece the came from the Dark abyss. It can be obtained when you defeat Carsharp.
Medal that shows the owner can go on an expedition of Elga.
A box full of the Gingerbread man's chocolates! They're really soft and creamy, go on, take a bite!
The Gingerbread man's main ingredient for his special chocolates!
Not a perfectly mutated monster, but it leaves some small traces.
Monsters who have united with a special energy are left with a piece in their body. They can be found in the Ork Field
Some monsters united with a special energy and started to transform themselves, making a different monster.
Nucleus of a United Energy has more energy than a Piece of United Energy. They can be found at the Orc Field
Unlike normal split energy which split into two pieces, mutated split energy split into multiple pieces that are very similar to original.
Energy does not have any special shape and it stays shining. When it's united with another lifeform they becomes a crystal. Can be found at the Orc hero.
When the energy unites with a monster it leaves a special piece in their body. They can be found at Glast Heim.
Nucleus of a crystal has much stronger energy compared to a Piece of crystal. They can be found at Glast Heim
A special grass that is known to speed up the monster split process. Can be found on special monsters.
Energy does not have any special shape and it stays shining, but when it's united with another lifeform they become a crystal. Can be found at Dark Load.
A Broken Valkyrie Hat. You can't wear it.
This Protection Stone allows one person entry to the Dungeon of Spirits.
To praise ghost hunters, Randy prepared a Halloween Token. Wait! Isn't Randy a ghost as well?
A concentrated energy chunk, it's all that remains from the defeated Halloween Ghost.
A sack where the presents for the children was carried in, now it is empty.
A present box that has been given away by Santa for his own personal interest.
A cute pouch that will be given away to children
Energy force that can be obtained from the monsters at Black Claw Nest
This box contains a cute kitty!
A wrapped up package, looks important.
Proof of delivery for Hime's package. You better take this to him.
Perhaps it could be used to fix the broken space energy.
It's heavy, there might be a weapon inside.
A tasty milk drink. It's good for you.
Larell's training weapon is better than this!
You could say this ointment is blesses by the god Panacea, the goddess of Universal Remedy.
A fresh nail from an Underground Graveyard Mummy!
Remember to read the manual before you go any further.
Traditional first aid tool from Kazeura village. There are various sized acupuncture needles inside.
Wyvern Egg left when Kyero died. Can't be hatched yet.
A glass incubator shaped in cylinder form.
Infrared Lamp which can be used when you increase the heat.
It's fun to make electronic products by yourself!
Crab stick which is full of Crabby's soft meat.
Top secret document that Ganu brought to Port of the Wind.
Top secret document that Ganu brought to Port of the Wind.
priest Maitri's recommendation for retaking fellowship of precious treasure.
Half-eaten Bread someone left. No one would dare to eat it in this condition.
Cookie with cursed power. It spoils your appetite when you look into it.
Malfunction Report which is printed through AutoLunch5's high-tech system.
Thank You Note from Colin to convey messages of thanks from the Dragon fellowship to Drakan Warriors.
Cheap Bandana which only third-rate Pirates would use. Only word to describe this bandana is 'terrible'.
Captain Hat which Hookah keeps as a souvenir. He got it from his first combat victory in the navy.
Decoration string from the Precious Treasure
Scroll which has spells for purifying Precious Treasure.
Pet Egg which a female hunter of the Mika Tribe left behind. I wonder when it will hatch.
Electronic device that mimics a bats ultrasonic ability.
Cheap integrated circuit which you can find many of when you disassemble the old electronic products.
Ingredient of chinese medicine to relieve the fatigue of soldiers.

Legendary milk product which promotes good health.
It will definitely help keep your digestive system healthy.
Special underwear to make you look like a dragon.
Force +3, but not able to equip.
Code manual to understand Farrell's code. It's written by Larell
The clue we needed to find out what the Shroom tribe is up to.
Black Dragon Lord, Elga's Myth is pictured on page 5, as 'Story of Wind, Earth, Water and Fire'
Parchment scroll which describes the Myth of the Black Dragon Lord, Elga
One of Devil's trinity. Dark Magic ingredients to call souls from the beyond.
One of Devil's trinity. Dark Magic's ingredients to call souls.
One of Devil's trinity. Dark Magic's ingredients to call souls.
Magma Coral Fields' warrior,Lava Boomboom's favorite thing
For minors, it's their alter ago.
Illuminate dark places with this candle
Necessary thing to go inside a coal mine.
Used in the creation of torches.
'Magma Coral Fields' tribe use it when they have their traditional ceremony.
Axe made of pieces of bones
Poison that make supplier's face size smaller.
Monster's hair decoration which may disgust you
Javelin that Webfoot tribe use. It's light to use.
Staff that Webfoot tribe's shaman uses .
Queen Vella's Healthy Food. It contains minerals and Amino acid, but also poisonous energy for people.
Scroll which has spells for purifying Precious Treasure.
Chinese medicine which make you be energetic.
Magical charm to test if there's Poison inside, like a litmus paper.
Magical Flute that can be used to lure Zaro away.
Stick made of Ebony Wood. Cumba monsters are bringing them.
Stick made of Rare Ebony Wood. Killo always hold it to be looked like an ascetic.
The Eight Trigrams for divination which has seven Spirit Shards shows you how to track down the Precious Treasure.
Old and rusty felling operation tool for Woodman group of Burnaun.
Letter written by Pyrei. Pyrei wrote it even in Kentarous' Language to persuade Hel Krouzer.
Kit containing everything required for a Pet Merchant to create an Evolution Crystal
Flute that makes the listening awake from even the deepest sleep.
Flute that makes the listening awake from even the deepest sleep.
Spirit Shard which carved the location of the Altar of Time on Golem Pythanous' body.
Spirit Shard came out from Pythanous' body
Essence which has shadow energy left from purified Akanai. Danku is looking for this item.
To be traded with Equipment from the Black Dragon Lord Recipe.
A Nutritious Rice Ball created using the Drakan's traditional recipe. It restores HP.
This dirty pouch is full of Prunes, a real delicacy across continent!
Legendary seasoning. Nothing can beat its taste.
Upgrades a regular backpack to an advanced backpack. Wings to improve the rotational force and power efficiency are included.
Material to Repair an Advanced Backpack
Unique metal found from meteorite fragments which have fallen to Dragotaka. It can alloy with Steel.
Part of an Armored Golem. Made of Vertadium Alloy.
Part of an Armored Barrel. Made of Vertadium Alloy.
Part of an Armored Kampaling. Made of Vertadium Alloy.
A Spirit Shard that was used in building the floating city, Sky Temple. It tends to float in the sky.
To bring back Parmir's memory, Syamalky drew Parmir's Coat of Arms onto a piece of parchment.
Unknown holy energy source that science today cannot identify. It seems like a concentrated Spirit Shard, according to Dr.Noel.
A box containing a Socket Card made from Spirit Shards. With luck, it may contain several Socket Cards.
An adapter that has a slot to insert a Socket Card containing a Spiritual Element. By installing this adapter onto the equipment, it enables the use of a Socket Card.
A Helmet with a Socket. Looks fashionable.
Teeth of Shark that says bring luck. Looks like something is between teeth.
Shell of Crabby. Dosen't look tasty
Blue shark fin. They are expansive.
Skin of a Mulosca. It's very smooth.
It looks like a potion, but gives powerful muscular pain relief.
Yellow star carried by Starry Lolo. Why do they carry this?
Tip of a Harpoon. Looks sharp.
Eye patch worn by pirates. Why does mum have this?
Very stylish hat. There is rumour saying that Captain is bald.
A contract that will tie someone till their death!
A traditional barrel to keep a traditional drink.
A trophy from a past war.
Monkey like Banana, but it is not just monkey who likes Banana
A legendary spice. But it is not as good as the legend says.
A fresh and tasty fish. Sharks like fish.
A meal prepared with Fish. Looks and smells good.
Crabby Shells are very healthy for you. Albiet a little crunchy.
Shark Tails are easy to find.
A special spice used in all good soups.
A special seaweed used as flavourful ingredient in seafood.
It says it will make your skin shine!
A heavy and tightly locked box.
This key might be able to open Captain Hookah's Locked boxes.
A beautiful whale tear, if the whale doesn't get its tear back it will surely die.
Jess left his belongings in this Wooden Chest. It's very light.
The treasure chest Jess keeps his most precious stuff in.
A key to open Jess's Treasure Chest
Yummy. Haven't you tasted a Crabby Roe yet?
A staple ingredient for many potions.
A Black Pearl with Magical Power. It's black colour attracts many people.
Tasty Puffer Roe. Be careful. It contains poison inside.
Known as one of the best baits.
It is the best fishing bait. It will surely attract a large shoal of fish.
A page from Jeremy's Book of Sages. Only Sages can read it.
A Marvelous cleanser that can remove book stains. You will see the difference!
Leo keeps this necklace in loving memory of his mum.
Looks delicious. Can also be used as polish.
Crispin's lost pouch. It may contain some gold.
A Military Ship Boarding Pass, should allow you to board a military vessel. But it looks suspicious.
A Genuine Boarding Pass that will allow you to board a military ship.
Victor's artwork. It rathers looks like a skull.
Victor's genuine artwork. It shows much artistic talent.
This letter was written by Leo's deceased parents.
The Captain's Log that was left in the wrecked ship.
Plans for an attack on Port of the Winds.
A friendly letter Sijin sent to Hime.
Mash this plant a bit and then rub it on your skin. Calms itchiness.
It has a strong healing power.
Sharp and hard. What is it made of?
The cheese Claire serves to her children.
It's rusty, but you could still give it a good swing.
A delicate bead. This would be prefect for embriodery.
Looks like it might be a diamond!
Rusty but it could still be worn.
A fossil of an ancient pet.
This grain will make the best noodles!
Yummy. I love it! What is this made of again? Mummy?!!!
A piece of a torn up receipt.
A very rare and precious Cheese Apple Seed. Plant it to grow a Cheese Apple Tree!
Creamy texture and a yummy taste!. Crabby Claws are the best!
You can manufacture Boost Backpack [Perry] using this blueprint.
A beautifully presented crabby claw picnic set!
This lens can focus sunlight into a strong beam.
A lunch bag, contains some nutritious snacks!
The full details of Artis's battle plans are in this document. Keep it safe!
A letter frome Hime challenging Frank!
A special herb, known for it's nice smell.
Hey Jess! You dropped this coin.
A mild sedative that relieves anxiety.
A mystery box Hime is waiting for from Sen. Cannot guess what is inside.
A Pirate Sword used by Kalygon
A meat that will calm you down, tast is not so good
A soup to calm mind. Taste horrible.
A bullet used for Kalygon gun. Not sure when they can be used.
Where did you get it Jack?
Where did you get it Jess?
There's no chance to see this as a ball-shaped candy.
Zombie's Leather which has been aged using a low ripening temperature.
This small treasure pocket is very handy.
Holy Water made of pure early morning dew
Rib bone with a little meat
There's a small amount of meat left on this bone.
Fresh and elegant Fin on Shark's body.
This armor piece seems to be useful for reproduction as it has great quality.
Portable cannon set which the Dragon Knight uses.
Breastplate of Lord of Night. It has great quality.
This order proves the owners honour.
Neat Bandage that Mummies keep for special festival.
If you collect those Feather decorations of Armor, you can even make them look like a bunch of flowers.
It's made of neat ribbon and Armor Decoration to be given to soldiers.
Basic Supply Set for New recruite.
Soldiers' necessaries, you also need hot boiled water to eat it.
Thick Toenail Dodu use it to dig the ground.
The fang proves owner to be Mole's Boss, it has pretty high value because of it has long and great quality.
Hair decoration of Shamans. They believe it gives them better power.
Upset Spark's leftover. It looks like a colorful eye shadow.
Antique Coffin shows what Kajimodo likes. It doesn't contain any corpes.

A cute snail in a ladybird patterned shell.

You can obtain special Achievement by using this item. Special Achievement can be found in [Journal] - [Achievement] - [Special].
Various item can be obtained if you use the key. No one knows what's in it.
Gold colored treasure box. Valuable items can be obtained from it.
The key which can be used for opening the Old Treasurebox.

Since it's made of Vegabond's Leather, it's very light and tough. It also can be dangerous because of the sharp toenail.
The Helmet made of dead Vegas' Leather. It's almost threatening.
It makes owner look pretty stupid.
Latest Fashion tiger-patterned pants. Show me your catwalk!
Wooden Shield that Kunkah used to have. It seems so heavy to hold it and move around.
This Hat looks better when the hat is on somewhat askew.
Could I sit on the priority seat?'
It makes funny sounds when the bones break each other. 'rattling,rattling'
Be careful not to drop it.
It may make you look like a bear, but not a stupid one.
Shrug,shrug. I can feel your shoulder has more tension than before.
It's very solid and tough, but also very heavy and hot to wear.
I wouldn't wear it if it wasn't that solid...its heaviness' almost giving me headache.
Who would dare confront me with this Fist?
Bracelet which is banana-shaped. It has a very good fragrance, but also has lots of pollen.
It has very good fragrance, but also has lots of pollen.
Necklace made of fragrant leaves. Lavender is good for relieving stress.
Beautiful Pink Wings. ('Real men wear Pink!' someone said that.)
Helmet made of Ice, but it doesn't seem to be breakable.
One of 6 Fists of Agnes. It's glove-type. It's freezing inside when you equip the gloves.
A ring that will help you to withstand cold.
A Earring that will help you to withstand cold.
A Necklace that will help you to withstand cold.
You can look an object from various angle, due to having three eyes. 'How man is that?'
A Crystal with the Dark Dragon Lord's force sealed inside. It is used to exchange for the Hero Dark Lord Armour Set.
A secret key that will unlock the sealed Dark Dragon Lord, It is used in exchange for the Hero Dark Lord Armor set.
An item that is used to increase your Defense while in the Elga Dungeon.
Coin that can be obtained from chests. It can be used to exchange items at vending machines.
Secret Serum that increases 5 pts. of Strength temporarily.
Secret Serum that increases 5 pts. of Agility temporarily.
Secret Serum that increases 5 pts. of Intelligence temporarily.
Secret Serum that increases 5 pts. of Health temporarily.
Broadcast a message across the channel - limited to 40 characters - item is used up after each shout (gPotato does not allow spam)
Broadcast a message across the realm - limited to 40 characters - item is used up after each shout (gPotato does not allow spam)
Public pledge of your love, visible to all across the channel - limited to 40 characters - item is used up after each shout (gPotato does not allow spam)
Summon party members to my current location.
The Phoenix feather allows you to rise from the ashes of defeat.
Click the right mouse button for details.
Ticket that can be exchanged for a reward. Once lost, it cannot be replaced so keep it somewhere safe until the exchange date!
Head of a sheep that died from a disease.
A simple log of wood, don't you just love the simple things in life?
The Vagabond's heart is popular among elderly men for certain medical reasons...
Rumour has it that you can attract sheep by blowing into it.
It's suitable for many different kinds of clothes.
The best part of a Wolf for making clothes.
A file with many different records of unknown mysteries.
Campfire necessity. Some use it as a weapon.
They say that the richest soil is the reddest.
Often used as glue by Fungoids
Extremely hot piece of equipment. It's amazing how somebody can swing this around.
You couldn't even slice bread with this thing.
Boombooms do not brush their teeth. Now that's a smell to remember.
The blade's so worn there can't be any use for it.
If the skull looks this bad, then the face must have been some sight.
Don't think about putting something in this, there's a hole in it.
A dog's favourite. One of the reasons why skeletons do not appear near town.
Dark circles that appear when you're tired.
They used to wear this on their heads. I know what you're thinking but don't try and eat it.
You must be in big trouble if you need this.
Stylish headpiece but don't try wearing this on a windy day.
Somehow, putting bills in it seems appropriate.
Bat nose that looks like a pig snout. At least pig snouts can be eaten.
They're like miniature Demonic Wings. How cute!
This goes with the saying: Screw loose.
At first it's great to collect, but later on, it's just more stuff to carry.
Pretty useless, but I'm sure you can make some money by selling it to a junkyard.
The term 'personal' is the most appealing thing about this product.
You're not fooling anyone by passing off this old bandage as a brand new one.
Now that you have picked up bandages, all you need to do now is get hurt...
Rolled up bandages are more important than people think.
It's disgusting! No wonder the Shadow Man always hides his hand!
The Shadow Man seems to be using magic to move the paper.
Pretty sharp claws, you could almost use this as a saw!
Crab meat is by far the best-tasting.
What's that on your mouth? I hope it's not Sand Foam! Disgusting!
Mixing Rice in a shell, life can't get any better!
Can only be acquired when you attack during mealtimes. Do what you gotta do.
Let's count...One, two, three, doesn't seem so old.
Some people use it as a toothpick.
The person who uses this leaf as a bookmark must be very romantic.
What luck? No bug has gotten its grubby hands on it yet.
Hitting someone or something with this could hurt you just as much.
Add salt and some seasoning then grill. Y-U-M-M-Y!
Decent-looking head to mount. Of course that's not much to be proud of now, is it?
Sharp wolf claws that even Vagabond would be proud of!
What is this, a back scratch?
How hungry would you have to be before you try this?
Collecting a lot of it would help in making a scarf.
The teeth smell awful. Some people actually make necklaces out of these.
Durable leather pants made from tiger skin.
Cheap paper roll with less absorbing power.
The original intention of engraving a skull on the shield was to scare off enemies. But whoever did the engraving did it wrong, it's a real cute looking shield!
Try to burn this instead of fuel on a cold winter day. You might be able to make some spare money by selling it in the market.
Very expensive prime ribeye of wolf.
You might be able to turn this smelly piece of meat into something edible. Still better than nothing!
Looks pretty useless. Who knows what a good crafter can do with it?
Used to be an actual Woodi. I wonder where Woodies go when they die? The great forest in the sky?
Poor quality emerald; Maybe you can make it into an accessory if you craft it properly?
Rumour has it that some weirdo is collecting cute little baby Starries.
A packet of emergency rations made of dried food.
Short and thick reddish Escargot legs.
Antennae used to make massage sticks.
Antennae that the elderly like due to the colour.
Many have confused this for a UFO.
Lolo legs are creepy when you take a closer look.
The Lala's legs are white like the clouds.
The mouth looks as if it might just open up and chomp down.
The Lolo Shell might be a great gift for that special someone
Can be made into a cushion with a zipper and some stuffing.
Thick iron necklace which someone left.
Thick iron bracelet which someone left.
Ribbit Eye. Do I really have to keep this?
Precious ingredient that is only available in Elyades.
Red Bandana that symbolizes the pirates.
Pirate Captain's Hat. Arrgh! Can I be a pirate with this hat?
Old, dull blade, used by pirates.
Pirates just love this Shark Plush Doll.
Poisonous Puffer Fin. Be careful when you cook it.

Fish bones, someone already ate it all.
If you don't know how to cook it, then don't even start!
Puffer Tail. Very popular among men. Do you know why?
Piece of wood that's good for starting a fire.
Mysterious tribe in the far east use this as a medical ingredient.
Must only be eaten if you're are extremely hungry.
Chicken head cane gives smile to anyone.
Keep your neck warm from cold wind.
Kunka's shoulder ornament decorated with red scrubs. It's not close to be a practical armour though.

Trash from failed attempts. Perhaps you can collect and sell them.
A large piece of pumpkin. Unpleasant to eat raw, but with a bit of seasoning and spices it should be alright!
This dagger must have seen a lot of action, it's very worn down. Maybe you'd be better buying a new one.
This poison is deadly in the wrong hands. If you don't know your CO2 from your CH3CN stay well away!
A cogged wheel that can't even roll, pretty useless.
A skull used for ceremonial purposes. I wonder if it's real!?
Blue toadstool. Can't you just tell it's poisonous?

Durable metal that can be turned into a fine equipment.
The finest lamb meat in all the land.
Piece of scroll that holds secrets of Fire magic.
A skilfully made Helmet; somewhat small though.
It's numerous blades make it too dangerous for newbies.
A beautiful rainbow shell. It would be very valuable amongst collectors.
Excellent food ingredient for making stew or soup.
Magician's coffin that is under a curse.

A very old belt. Wondering what this is worth?
Its miserable name originates from the colouring and engravings on it.
A side dish that fits perfectly with hot tea.

Lavalon's heart. A skilled blacksmith should be able to make a valuable weapon from it.

A very hard piece of ore.
The blueprint for making Magichenge weapons.

Fine clay with good flexibility and texture.
Small piece of Crysolite. It seems to be too small to be used.

Relatively well made accessory. Though, it doesn't seem to have been made by human hands.
